title: SelectorConfig
description: Dynamic DOM selector registry for multi-platform publishers. Persisted by apps/ts-api-gateway/lib/selectorStore.ts and consumed by SelectorReader.

version.description: Semver, e.g. "1.3.0". Bump on structural changes (added/removed keys, schema changes).

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of last write (UTC, ends with Z).

source.description: Free-form description of the source pipeline (e.g. "scripts/extract_selectors.py + apply_overrides.py").

platforms.description: Map of platform name to its selector tree.

purposes.description: Workflow stages this selector participates in.

primary.description: Highest-priority selector. Use getByRole/getByText when possible; fall back to css / xpath only when needed.

fallbacks.description: Ordered list of fallbacks. Index 0 is first attempted after primary fails.

selectorType.description: Strategy classification. Must match one of the 9-layer ordered strategies.
